task: Perform an expert audit of a candidate feature set for training/serving leakage using only the embedded packet. Classify each feature for leakage risk per the rules (unavailable_at_serve OR after_label => leakage; high risk if both). Remove or mark unsafe features, produce a recommended retraining gate, and deliver an executable spreadsheet and a governance memo containing formulas/logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
